name: Chronic Renal Insufficiency
definition: Chronic progressive renal parenchymal damage from various causes
etiology: Diabetic nephropathy, hypertensive nephropathy, chronic glomerulonephritis, polycystic kidney
symptoms: Edema, fatigue, loss of appetite, anemia, bone disease
treatment_principles: Control primary disease, dietary control, manage complications, renal replacement therapy
prevention_advice: Control blood pressure and glucose, avoid nephrotoxic drugs, regular renal function check, balanced diet
